Age Range Ages 5–7
Schedule Multiple times weekly

Little Champions Classes in Pembroke Pines

Age Range: Ages 5–7  |  Schedule: Multiple times weekly  |  Experience: No experience required

Our Little Champions program helps your child develop far beyond the mat. Students gain the physical benefits of martial arts training while building the life skills that matter most — discipline, confidence, focus, and leadership. Instructors create a positive, encouraging environment where every child thrives.

Does your student face any of these challenges?

✗

Struggles with confidence or gets pushed around

✗

Has trouble focusing in school or following through

✗

Wants to learn how to protect themselves if a situation arises

See Pricing & Program Details
What They'll Gain

How This Program Will Help Your Child

Real results — on the mats and in everyday life.

Build Physical Strength

Our program teaches your child how to engage with others and react in different situations while establishing friendly and positive habits that last a lifetime.

Learn Socialization

Kids may or may not be naturally sociable — this program helps them become more comfortable and confident around other people, building friendships that extend beyond the mats.

Improve Focus and Discipline

With the way of martial arts, your kids will develop skills that sharpen their attention to what really matters — and learn self-discipline that carries directly into school performance.

Community Love

Why Pembroke Pines Families Love
Premier Martial Arts Pines

Don't take our word for it — here's what our students and parents say.

★★★★★

"Premier Martial Arts has been an incredible experience for our 5-year-old daughter! It's been so much fun watching her progress, not just in karate skills, but also in confidence and discipline. The instructors are fantastic with all the children, creating a positive and encouraging learning environment. We especially love the Friday night 'Parents' Night Out' — what a fantastic perk! We highly recommend Premier Martial Arts to any family looking for a great martial arts program for their kids."

G
Guillermo Lopez
Gvia Google
★★★★★

"This is a great martial art school. My son Michael started off doing white belt training, he was switched to blackbelt training and is doing great. All of the instructors are hands-on. They work with the kids. They give them the attention and discipline that they need. I would highly recommend this school."

A
Anita S.
Gvia Google
★★★★★

"Our daughter absolutely loves Premier Martial Arts, they are such a great community, they love teaching children and it shows — our daughter looks forward to her weekly classes here!!"

Y
Yesenia M.
Gvia Google
★★★★★

"My son has been coming to PMA for 6 years now. He loves the classes, camps, and the teachers. We love the life skills and knowledge they are teaching him — far beyond just martial arts while having fun."

J
Jennifer L.
Gvia Google
★★★★★

"We absolutely love PMA! My son Oliver (7yo) has been at PMA for a few months now. His progress has been amazing in such a short time — not only in martial art skills, but he's also more confident and disciplined. The instructors are all very knowledgeable, respectful, and treat everyone like family. The owner, Mr. Asesor, and the office manager, Mr. Vega, make us feel like family. I recommend PMA wholeheartedly!"

J
Jasiel Morales
Gvia Google
FAQ

Got Questions? We've Got Answers.

Everything you need to know before your first class.

Do I need any experience to join Little Champions? +
No experience is required. Little Champions is designed to welcome complete beginners. Our instructors guide every student through technique step by step from the very first class — you just need to show up.
How much does Little Champions cost? +
Pricing depends on membership tier and training frequency. Download our free Starter Kit for current pricing and any active promotions, or book a free intro session and speak directly with our team.
How long before I see results? +
Most students notice real improvements in fitness, focus, and technique within the first 30–60 days. Confidence gains tend to happen faster — many students feel a difference within the first few weeks of consistent training.
What should I bring to my first class? +
Just wear comfortable athletic clothes — shorts and a t-shirt are perfect. No uniform or equipment is needed until you decide to enroll. We take care of everything else for your first session.
How often should I train each week? +
We recommend 2–3 classes per week for steady progress. Students who train consistently advance faster and build stronger habits. Our schedule is designed to be flexible enough to fit real life.

Ready to Get Started?
Your First Class Is Free.

More Confidence. More Focus. Download Our Free Starter Kit Today.

Download and get access to our starter kit which includes details on our programs, which program is right for you or your kids, pricing, schedules, a tour of our campus, and special promotions.

Premier Martial Arts Pines

Premier Martial Arts Pines is Pembroke Pines's premier martial arts academy. We develop champions on and off the mats through world-class instruction and a supportive community.
